name: page-header
purpose: Card header for Nimiq page flows: centered title, optional back arrow, optional step progress indicator. Used at the top of a SmallPage.

props.name: backArrow
props.description: Show a back arrow on the left; emits 'back' on click

props.name: progressIndicator
props.description: Show the step progress bar across the top of the card

props.name: numberSteps
props.description: Total number of steps in the progress indicator

props.name: step
props.description: Current step (1-based); steps <= step are highlighted

notes: Sample state: inside a SmallPage, title 'Send Transaction', backArrow=true, progressIndicator=true, 6 steps, step 3. ArrowLeftIcon (arrow-left.svg from @nimiq/style) is inlined. $t stubbed to identity ('Go back').
